form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 10th (Fr2) over 1785m at Stawell beaten 22 m by Roblen Ranger (2:10.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 3 at $101. Before that 4th (Fr4) over 1680m at Terang, beaten 6 m by Huxham Chubb (2:05.80) in NR up to 45 on March 27 at $51. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into tenth behind Skyz Above at Ballarat over 2200m in a NR up to 42 on March 19 at $1.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.75 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Shiralee at Kilmore over 2180m in a NR 36 to 40 on April 2 at $5.50. Very hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr3) over 2180m at Stawell was 4th-4.4 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Lester (2:42.90) in NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $4.20. Before that, a good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 2195m at Ararat, at the bell was 7th-9.4 beaten 5.5 m by Line Up Jacquie (2:45.10) in NR 39 to 45 on March 23 at $13. Big chance to find the winners' list.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced when Hanover Jack hung out near the 200m.
Paced roughly near the 900m before breaking at the 600m.
Checked while trailing Rocking Wroxton at approximately the 700m.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1785m after showing early pace at Stawell was leading by 0.8 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Optimal (2:11.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 3 at $7.50. At the start before 7th (Fr3) over 1680m after showing early speed at Terang beaten 12 m by Admiralofthefleet (2:02.50) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $23. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 1.5 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at Mt Gambier (2:13.80) beating Majestic Cheddar in MAIDEN on April 7 at $14 at the bell was leading 5.6. Two runs back 6th (Fr3) over 1790m at Ararat, at the bell was 4th-5.7 beaten 11 m by Topsie Beware (2:13.60) in MAIDEN on March 23 at $126. Prefer to watch at this level.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 2190m after being wide early at Mt Gambier, at the bell was 5th-12.4 beaten 17 m by Famous Label (2:46.60) in NR up to 44 on April 7 at $31. Two runs back was well back in the run when 2nd (Fr6) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park, at the bell was 5th-8.4 beaten a nose by Childers Road (2:14.70) in NR up to 43 on March 21 at $7. Might find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4.5 m third behind Optimal at Stawell over 1785m 4yo+ NR up to 49 last start. Before that was beaten 1.75 metres third again at Stawell same class on April 3. Expected to be in the finish again.

At the run before 10th (Fr1) over 1785m at Stawell beaten 25 m by Optimal (2:11.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 3 at $13. Doesn't need to improve a great deal to take this out.

form.formComment: Resuming after four-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into eleventh behind Riveera at Shepparton over 1690m in a NR up to 49 on December 2 at $31. Will make her presence felt.
